name: Expression is Always True
description: The product contains an expression that will always evaluate to true, indicating a logic error that may lead to dead code or unintended control flow. This can mask security checks or make conditional branches unreachable.
detection_pattern: CONTROL node with a conditional expression where static analysis determines the condition is invariantly true. Look for CONTROL nodes whose branching logic never activates the false path, potentially bypassing TRANSFORM or AUTH mediators.
